nodes.name: Schedule (1 phút)
nodes.notes: Lưới an toàn: mỗi phút rút hàng đợi outbox và đẩy sang Sheet. Đảm bảo Sheet luôn khớp Supabase.

nodes.name: Trigger: drain ngay (tuỳ chọn)
nodes.notes: Frontend ping webhook này khi mirror tức thời lỗi → đẩy lại Sheet trong ~1s thay vì chờ tới phút kế. Bảo vệ bằng Header Auth.

parameters.query:
-- Giành (claim) tối đa 50 việc đến hạn, đánh dấu 'sending' để 2 lần drain song song không ghi trùng.
UPDATE sheet_sync_outbox
SET status = 'sending', updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id IN (
  SELECT id FROM sheet_sync_outbox
  WHERE (status IN ('pending','error') AND next_attempt_at <= NOW())
     OR (status = 'sending' AND updated_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes')  -- gỡ kẹt nếu drain trước chết giữa chừng
  ORDER BY id
  LIMIT 50
  FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED
)
RETURNING id AS _outbox_id, validation_code, sheet_patch, attempts;

nodes.name: 1. Claim Due Rows
nodes.notes: Dùng credential Postgres (Supabase). FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED chống ghi trùng khi 2 drain chạy song song.

nodes.name: 3. Update Sheet Row
nodes.notes: Khớp theo cột 'id' (= mã thẩm định). Lỗi → nhánh phải để đánh dấu error + retry.

parameters.query:
UPDATE sheet_sync_outbox
SET status = 'done', last_error = NULL, updated_at = NOW()
WHERE validation_code = '{{ ($json["ID thẩm định"] || "").toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
  AND status = 'sending';

UPDATE sheet_sync_outbox
SET status = 'error', attempts = attempts + 1,
    last_error = 'WF-06: ghi Google Sheet thất bại (xem execution log)',
    next_attempt_at = NOW() + (LEAST(power(2, attempts) * 30, 600) || ' seconds')::interval,
    updated_at = NOW()
WHERE validation_code = '{{ ($json["ID thẩm định"] || "").toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
  AND status = 'sending';
DELETE FROM sheet_sync_outbox WHERE status = 'done' AND updated_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days';

-- n8n Postgres node query.
-- Configure queryReplacement to the n8n payload_b64 expression.
with payload as (
  select convert_from(decode($1, 'base64'), 'UTF8')::jsonb as body
),
fingerprint as (
  select
    body,
    encode(
      extensions.digest(
        convert_to((body -> 'headers')::text || (body -> 'rows')::text, 'UTF8'),
        'sha256'
      ),
      'hex'
    ) as checksum
  from payload
),
latest as (
  select id, checksum, unique_validation_count, object_count, completed_at
  from public.vmp_sheet_sync_runs
  where status = 'completed'
  order by created_at desc
  limit 1
)
select case
  when l.checksum = f.checksum
   and (select count(*) from public.vmp_plan_items) = l.unique_validation_count
   and (select count(*) from public.vmp_objects) = l.object_count
   and not exists (
     select 1 from public.vmp_plan_items p
     where p.source_sync_run_id is distinct from l.id
        or p.updated_at > l.completed_at
   )
   and not exists (
     select 1 from public.vmp_objects o
     where o.source_sync_run_id is distinct from l.id
        or o.updated_at > l.completed_at
   )
  then jsonb_build_object(
    'ok', true,
    'skipped', true,
    'reason', 'unchanged_checksum',
    'checksum', f.checksum
  )
  else public.rpc_sync_vmp_sheet_snapshot_with_extras(
    '1MPG6YbR6m-YrENqb8u7uS3O8RUYk7GCYuzQRbShtqP8',
    '1252715724',
    '6.Timeline VMP',
    f.body -> 'headers',
    f.body -> 'rows'
  )
end as sync_result
from fingerprint f
left join latest l on true;

-- S2-B FIX: SET app.audit_source để audit_logs ghi đúng nguồn
SET LOCAL app.audit_source = 'wf01_sheet_sync';
SET LOCAL app.audit_reason = 'Đồng bộ tự động từ Google Sheet (INSERT)';

INSERT INTO vmp_plan_items (
  id, validation_code, object_code, validation_type, report_class,
  owner_name, effort_days, criticality_score,
  deadline_vmp, deadline_protocol, deadline_report,
  actual_protocol_date, actual_validation_date, actual_report_date, actual_vmp_date,
  scheduled_date,
  status_protocol, status_validation, status_report, status_vmp,
  is_active, year
) VALUES (
  '{{ String($json.validation_code).replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ String($json.validation_code).replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ String($json.object_code || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ String($json.validation_type || 'PQ').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ String($json.report_class || 'Không phụ thuộc').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  {{ $json.owner_name ? "'" + String($json.owner_name).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }},
  {{ $json.effort_days != null && $json.effort_days !== '' ? Number($json.effort_days) : "NULL" }},
  {{ $json.criticality_score != null && $json.criticality_score !== '' ? Number($json.criticality_score) : "NULL" }},
  {{ $json.deadline_vmp ? "'" + $json.deadline_vmp + "'::DATE" : "NULL" }},
  {{ $json.deadline_protocol ? "'" + $json.deadline_protocol + "'::DATE" : "NULL" }},
  {{ $json.deadline_report ? "'" + $json.deadline_report + "'::DATE" : "NULL" }},
  {{ $json.actual_protocol_date ? "'" + $json.actual_protocol_date + "'::DATE" : "NULL" }},
  {{ $json.actual_validation_date ? "'" + $json.actual_validation_date + "'::DATE" : "NULL" }},
  {{ $json.actual_report_date ? "'" + $json.actual_report_date + "'::DATE" : "NULL" }},
  {{ $json.actual_vmp_date ? "'" + $json.actual_vmp_date + "'::DATE" : "NULL" }},
  {{ $json.scheduled_date ? "'" + $json.scheduled_date + "'::DATE" : "NULL" }},
  '{{ $json.status_protocol || 'not_started' }}'::phase_status,
  '{{ $json.status_validation || 'not_started' }}'::phase_status,
  '{{ $json.status_report || 'not_started' }}'::phase_status,
  '{{ $json.status_vmp || 'not_started' }}'::phase_status,
  true,
  {{ Number($json.year) || new Date().getFullYear() }}
)
ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING;

INSERT INTO data_quality_issues (plan_item_id, issue_type, severity, field_name, field_value, expected_value, message, detected_at) SELECT '{{ $json.validation_code.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', 'sync_conflict', 'warning', '{{ $json.field }}', '{{ String($json.sheet_val ?? '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ String($json.db_val ?? '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ ('Xung đột ' + $json.validation_code + ' · ' + $json.field + ': DB=' + $json.db_val + ' / Sheet=' + $json.sheet_val).replace(/'/g, "''") }}', NOW() WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM data_quality_issues d WHERE d.issue_type = 'sync_conflict' AND d.is_resolved = false AND d.plan_item_id = '{{ $json.validation_code.replace(/'/g, "''") }}' AND d.field_name = '{{ $json.field }}')

description: Google Sheet 6.Timeline VMP là nguồn chuẩn. Apps Script gọi webhook instant có Header Auth; lịch 5 phút là fallback. Supabase là read model và chỉ n8n/Postgres service được ghi snapshot.
